title: Driver/Sales Workers
description: Drive truck or other vehicle over established routes or within an established territory and sell or deliver goods, such as food products, including restaurant take-out items, or pick up or deliver items such as commercial laundry. May also take orders, collect payment, or stock merchandise at point of delivery.

tasks.text: Drive trucks to deliver such items as food, medical supplies, or newspapers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform regular customers of new products or services and price changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record sales or delivery information on daily sales or delivery record.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Listen to and resolve customers' complaints regarding products or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect money from customers, make change, and record transactions on customer receipts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain trucks and food-dispensing equipment and clean inside of machines that dispense food or beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange merchandise and sales promotion displays or issue sales promotion materials to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect coins from vending machines, refill machines, and remove aged merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write customer orders and sales contracts according to company guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review lists of dealers, customers, or station drops and load trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Sell food specialties, such as sandwiches and beverages, to office workers and patrons of sports events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
